psionic_powers.name: Barrier
psionic_powers.description: Create a protective energy field that intercepts incoming attacks. When successfully activated, negates ranged hits on a target on a roll of 4+ on 1D6.

effects.name: Deflection
effects.description: Each ranged hit on protected target must roll 4+ or is negated

psionic_powers.name: Grab
psionic_powers.description: Psionically seize and immobilize a target, holding them in place through mental force.

activation.duration: Until target passes Savvy test or caster releases

effects.name: Immobilization
effects.description: Target cannot move but may still attack with -1 Combat Skill. May attempt Savvy test each round to break free.

psionic_powers.name: Lift
psionic_powers.description: Telekinetically lift and move objects or creatures through the air.

effects.name: Levitation
effects.description: Move target up to 4" in any direction, including vertical. Can move target over obstacles or terrain.

effects.name: Environmental Manipulation
effects.description: Can be used to move objects, create barriers, or reposition terrain elements.

psionic_powers.name: Push
psionic_powers.description: Generate a powerful telekinetic shove that knocks targets backwards.

effects.name: Knockback
effects.description: Push target 1D6" directly away from caster. If target impacts terrain or another figure, both take 1 damage.

effects.name: Stunning
effects.description: Target must make Reactions test or lose next activation.

psionic_powers.name: Sever
psionic_powers.description: Project a blade of pure psionic energy to cut through matter and minds alike.

effects.name: Psionic Damage
effects.description: Make attack roll using Savvy instead of Combat Skill. On hit, target takes 1D6 damage that ignores armor.

effects.name: Mental Strain
effects.description: Organic targets that survive must pass Savvy test or suffer -1 to all rolls next round.

psionic_powers.name: Shielding
psionic_powers.description: Envelope yourself in a protective aura of psionic energy.

effects.name: Personal Force Field
effects.description: Grants 5+ armor save that stacks with worn armor. If already have armor, improve save by 1 (5+ becomes 4+, etc.)

psionic_powers.name: Step
psionic_powers.description: Instantly teleport to a nearby location through psionic means.

effects.name: Teleportation
effects.description: Immediately move to any location within line of sight and 8" range. Ignore terrain and obstacles. Cannot teleport into occupied space.

effects.name: Disorienting Exit
effects.description: Enemies within 2" of departure point must pass Savvy test or suffer -1 Reactions next round.

psionic_powers.name: Stun
psionic_powers.description: Overwhelm a target's nervous system with psionic energy, temporarily incapacitating them.

effects.name: Incapacitation
effects.description: Target cannot move or take actions. Automatically affected by any attack (no roll to hit needed). Taking any damage breaks the stun.

psionic_powers.name: Suggestion
psionic_powers.description: Implant a subtle mental command that influences a target's actions.

activation.duration: 1 round or until target takes damage

effects.name: Mind Control
effects.description: Target must obey one simple command: 'move here', 'attack that target', 'drop weapon', etc. Target acts on caster's initiative. Savvy test to resist at -2.

psionic_powers.name: Weaken
psionic_powers.description: Sap an enemy's strength and vitality through psionic drain.

effects.name: Attribute Reduction
effects.description: Reduce target's Toughness by 1 (minimum 1) and Combat Skill by 1 for duration.

effects.name: Cumulative Effect
effects.description: Multiple Weaken effects on same target stack (max -2 to each attribute).
